businessQuestion: Which stores have the highest average stockout duration?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DS.STORE_NAME,
    DS.REGION,
    COUNT(*) AS STOCKOUT_EVENTS,
    ROUND(AVG(SE.DURATION_DAYS),2) AS AVG_DURATION_DAYS,
    SUM(SE.LOST_REVENUE_ESTIMATED) AS LOST_REVENUE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_STOCKOUT_EVENT SE
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_STORE DS
    ON SE.STORE_KEY = DS.STORE_KEY
GROUP BY
    DS.STORE_NAME,
    DS.REGION
ORDER BY AVG_DURATION_DAYS DESC;
businessContext: Operations managers want to reduce the length of stockout events to improve product availability.
